message:
feat(search): wire unified search service into web UI (br-3vwi.2.3)

Replace direct queries::search_messages call in the mail_ui web search
handler with search_service::execute_search_simple. All three server
API surfaces (MCP tools, product search, web UI) now use the unified
plan→execute→map pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
